title: 02194_Continuation_Path_Learning_for_Homotopy_Optimization
positive_examples: The proposed model can generate solutions for any intermediate subproblem in real time, which is desirable for many real-world applications.
CPL can achieve promising performances on various problems, including non-convex optimization, noisy regression, and neural combinatorial optimization.
CPL can improve the generalization performance for a neural combinatorial optimization solver, such as in the traveling salesman problem.
